title: Postgraduate Certificate in Clinical Trichology and Hair Restoration Medicine
workingTitle: Postgraduate Certificate in Clinical Trichology and Hair Restoration Medicine
overview: Structured doctor education in clinical trichology, diagnostic reasoning, therapeutics, and surgical foundations within an academic IIOHR framework.
whoItsFor: Doctors entering or advancing in hair restoration medicine
Physicians seeking structured clinical trichology education
whyItMatters: Creates a consistent standards-led route into the specialty
Supports safer clinical reasoning and case selection
Links academic training to faculty oversight and certification
certificationSummary: Certificate eligibility requires completion of required modules and assessments
Faculty review remains part of final certification governance
clinicLicensingSummary: Doctor stream is designed to sit within wider clinic and faculty ecosystems
Future clinic-facing reporting can be layered onto the shared academy core
faqSummary: Program routes remain separate from consultant education
Curriculum remains clinically and academically framed
